texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RE: YEAR 2025 CONTRACT TO BOUNTIFUL SAFARIS
texts.text: RE: YEAR 2025 CONTRACT TO BOUNTIFUL SAFARIS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Greetings from JCH GROUP -International Comfort, African Hospitality.
texts.text: Greetings from JCH GROUP -International Comfort, African Hospitality.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are pleased to submit to you our rate offer as below:
texts.text: We are pleased to submit to you our rate offer as below:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Chester House, Koinange Street P. O. Box 57104 -00200, Nairobi Kenya Tel. 254 722 208 575 or 0728 607 626
texts.text: Chester House, Koinange Street P. O. Box 57104 -00200, Nairobi Kenya Tel. 254 722 208 575 or 0728 607 626

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner, Mineral Water and Guided Bush Walk
texts.text: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner, Mineral Water and Guided Bush Walk

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Conservancy Entrance Fees, Conservancy activities and any other extras.
texts.text: Conservancy Entrance Fees, Conservancy activities and any other extras.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Accommodation rates do not include conservancy fees.
texts.text: Accommodation rates do not include conservancy fees.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Festive Supplement dates: On 24 th , 25 th , 26 th , 31 st  Dec & 1 st  Jan and every other public holiday.
texts.text: Festive Supplement dates: On 24 th , 25 th , 26 th , 31 st  Dec & 1 st  Jan and every other public holiday.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Travel agent may not sell room rate above our rack rate. Commission at 30%.
texts.text: Travel agent may not sell room rate above our rack rate. Commission at 30%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In Mutara, a full camp utilizing all 15 tents can cater for an additional 6 drivers only.
texts.text: In Mutara, a full camp utilizing all 15 tents can cater for an additional 6 drivers only.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For any conservancy activities minimum number of pax is 2.
texts.text: For any conservancy activities minimum number of pax is 2.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: $55.00 pp (Min 2 pax & Max 5 pax) One Way
texts.text: $55.00 pp (Min 2 pax & Max 5 pax) One Way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: $70.00 pp (Min 2 pax & Max 5 pax) One Way
texts.text: $70.00 pp (Min 2 pax & Max 5 pax) One Way

texts.label: text
texts.orig: (Bottle of Wine, Flowers, Petals Décor, Massage)
texts.text: (Bottle of Wine, Flowers, Petals Décor, Massage)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Exclusive use of Vehicle                                       $500 per day
texts.text: Exclusive use of Vehicle                                       $500 per day

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 15 Luxury Tents approximately 500 -600 sq ft, furnished to a high standard. Six tents fitted with outdoor bath tubs and One Tent with outdoor Jacuzzi. Tents 1 -9 Overlooking watering hole.
texts.text: 15 Luxury Tents approximately 500 -600 sq ft, furnished to a high standard. Six tents fitted with outdoor bath tubs and One Tent with outdoor Jacuzzi. Tents 1 -9 Overlooking watering hole.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 13 Double beds and 2 Twins all fitted with electric blankets.
texts.text: 13 Double beds and 2 Twins all fitted with electric blankets.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Private Balconies and In- Room Safes
texts.text: Private Balconies and In- Room Safes

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Magnifying mirror and hair dryer in every bathroom
texts.text: Magnifying mirror and hair dryer in every bathroom

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Soaps, Shampoos and lotions provided by Cinnabar Green High Pressure Showers, always hot.
texts.text: Soaps, Shampoos and lotions provided by Cinnabar Green High Pressure Showers, always hot.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Turn down with hot water bottle
texts.text: Turn down with hot water bottle

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Dining and Lounge area overlooking watering hole.
texts.text: Dining and Lounge area overlooking watering hole.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) You are required to make a booking in writing by e-mail correspondence
texts.text: You are required to make a booking in writing by e-mail correspondence

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) The Management will provide a written confirmation by email
texts.text: The Management will provide a written confirmation by email

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Cancellations or amendments should be made formally on email
texts.text: Cancellations or amendments should be made formally on email

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) The Management will provide a written cancellation or amendment by email return.
texts.text: The Management will provide a written cancellation or amendment by email return.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Rate is $180.00 per person sharing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Single Supplement of $30.00 per room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Local Tour Leader pay 50% of resident rack rates.
texts.text: Local Tour Leader pay 50% of resident rack rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) International Tour Leader pay 50% of non - resident rack rates.
texts.text: International Tour Leader pay 50% of non - resident rack rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) Drivers full board rate is $30.00 per person.
texts.text: Drivers full board rate is $30.00 per person.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Any cancellation made less than 14 days prior to arrival, will be charged 100% of the total booking and no show will be charged 100% of total booking.
texts.text: Any cancellation made less than 14 days prior to arrival, will be charged 100% of the total booking and no show will be charged 100% of total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Any cancellation made between 15 and 30 days prior to arrival, will be charged 50% of the total booking.
texts.text: Any cancellation made between 15 and 30 days prior to arrival, will be charged 50% of the total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) Any cancellation made between 31 and 60 days prior to arrival, will be charged 25% of the total booking.
texts.text: Any cancellation made between 31 and 60 days prior to arrival, will be charged 25% of the total booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) Cancellations made more than 61+ days prior to arrival will not be charged.
texts.text: Cancellations made more than 61+ days prior to arrival will not be charged.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: e) Billing arrangement and payment policy
texts.text: e) Billing arrangement and payment policy

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) The Pro-forma invoice will be sent upon reservation confirmation; 50% deposit has to be settled by the latest 3 days after receipt of invoice and full payment has to be settled 7 days prior to guest- arrival date.
texts.text: The Pro-forma invoice will be sent upon reservation confirmation; 50% deposit has to be settled by the latest 3 days after receipt of invoice and full payment has to be settled 7 days prior to guest- arrival date.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) All payments to be made by cash,company's cheque or bank transfer to the bank details provided.
texts.text: All payments to be made by cash,company's cheque or bank transfer to the bank details provided.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designates clientele, and shall not be disclosed to other third parties. Unauthorized disclosure of content will automatically terminate this agreement.
texts.text: This contract remains confidential between the undersigned and designates clientele, and shall not be disclosed to other third parties. Unauthorized disclosure of content will automatically terminate this agreement.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) Any amendment to this agreement shall not be valid until agreed in writing by both parties.
texts.text: Any amendment to this agreement shall not be valid until agreed in writing by both parties.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Infants under 3 years sharing with adult/s -No Charge.
texts.text: Infants under 3 years sharing with adult/s -No Charge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) 3 years up to 11 years sharing with parents pay 50%.
texts.text: 3 years up to 11 years sharing with parents pay 50%.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c) 12 -15 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults - Each child pays 75% of the applicable per person sharing rate.
texts.text: 12 -15 years sharing with 1 or 2 adults - Each child pays 75% of the applicable per person sharing rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d) Children in own room 3-15years -Each child pays 85% of the per person sharing rate.
texts.text: Children in own room 3-15years -Each child pays 85% of the per person sharing rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e) Child in own room -single supplement is applicable
texts.text: Child in own room -single supplement is applicable

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) Both parties agree to each carry adequate liability and other insurance protecting itself against any claims arising from any activities conducted during the period of accommodation.
texts.text: Both parties agree to each carry adequate liability and other insurance protecting itself against any claims arising from any activities conducted during the period of accommodation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b) The performance of the agreement by either party is subject to acts of nature, war, government regulations, disaster, strikes, civil disorder, curtailment of transportation facilities, or any other emergency making it illegal or impossible to provide the facilities contracted.
texts.text: The performance of the agreement by either party is subject to acts of nature, war, government regulations, disaster, strikes, civil disorder, curtailment of transportation facilities, or any other emergency making it illegal or impossible to provide the facilities contracted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a) This Agreement is valid immediately until 06 th  Jan 2026. Any inquiry for contract extension must be submitted at least one month prior to expiration date. The Monarch Group Limited reserves all rights to terminate the agreement before expiration date based on our professional consideration, without prejudice to confirmed bookings already in place.
texts.text: This Agreement is valid immediately until 06 th  Jan 2026. Any inquiry for contract extension must be submitted at least one month prior to expiration date. The Monarch Group Limited reserves all rights to terminate the agreement before expiration date based on our professional consideration, without prejudice to confirmed bookings already in place.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We thank you for your kind understanding and please kindly duly sign the below agreement for the agreed cooperation, meanwhile we look forward to our long-lasting cooperation.
texts.text: We thank you for your kind understanding and please kindly duly sign the below agreement for the agreed cooperation, meanwhile we look forward to our long-lasting cooperation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Illa Kaveke - Sales & Marketing Manager - JCH Group Ltd.
texts.text: Illa Kaveke - Sales & Marketing Manager - JCH Group Ltd.
